title: SeeNotTooManyMods With a Twist!
description: Beautiful graphics, speedy performance and Added more features in a simple package. 1.21.4
body:
Performance
SeeNotTooManyMods is faster than competing game clients, thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others. The bundled mods have been carefully selected to be safe in your worlds and provide noticeable speed benefits on any device.

OptiFine parity
SeeNotTooManyMods supports most OptiFine features, including shaders, connected textures, and zoom. If your resource pack states "OptiFine required," it will probably function here as well. You can even get your own free cape!

Feels familiar
SeeNotTooManyMods includes features that allow you to experience Minecraft just as you remember it, no matter what version you've used before. This means you can use game controllers, play local worlds with friends, view advancements in a large window, and much more.

Up to date
SeeNotTooManyMods receives fast updates and stands as one of the first modpacks to upgrade to newer Minecraft versions. Updating the modpack is easy and will preserve your mod settings, where possible.

Built on Fabric
SeeNotTooManyMods uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods. You can use the modpack as a base to add your favorite mods to.

Open development
SeeNotTooManyMods is open-source, and so are most of its mods. We welcome user suggestions and collaborate with mod developers to create a better user experience for everyone.


FAQ
Q: What mods does it have?

A: Click any version and scroll down or see the comparison table.

Q: I like the modpack. How can I contribute?

A: By giving us a like on the modrinth page! or kofi but thats not needed


This modpack was a modified version of Fabulously Optimized please give them some love also
do note all i did was add a few more features into it and decided i wanted to upload it as i think it has a few new helpful features <3
